overview: Givethra is a global trust-based humanitarian platform connecting verified Help Seekers with Heroes who support real needs directly.
features: Browse and discover verified help cases by category and location
Help Seekers submit cases with document uploads and pay a $1 listing fee
Heroes unlock full case details for $2 to support directly
Heroes submit proof of support after helping
Admin verification workflow moving cases through verification states
Proud Heart recognition system — one per completed case
Hero and Help Seeker profiles with trust scores and achievement badges
Role-based access for Heroes, Help Seekers, and Admins
Stripe payments for listing and unlock fees
Light and dark mode with mobile-first design
